# algorithm

**Instance Property**

The algorithm used by the generator.

## Declaration

```swift
var algorithm: ASImportableCredential.TOTP.Algorithm
```

## Discussion

This value must be one of [doc://com.apple.authenticationservices/documentation/AuthenticationServices/ASImportableCredential/TOTP/Algorithm-swift.enum/sha1], [doc://com.apple.authenticationservices/documentation/AuthenticationServices/ASImportableCredential/TOTP/Algorithm-swift.enum/sha256], or [doc://com.apple.authenticationservices/documentation/AuthenticationServices/ASImportableCredential/TOTP/Algorithm-swift.enum/sha512].

## Accessing TOTP properties

- **secret**: The secret associated with this generator.
- **period**: The period, in seconds, used by the generator to refresh codes.
- **digits**: The number of digits in the code used by the generator.
- **ASImportableCredential.TOTP.Algorithm**: An enumeration of algorithm types that all importers are expected to support.
- **issuer**: The issuer of the generator, if any.
